name: trimmr
description: Free, private, secure video editor—export or convert to other formats; files never leave your computer. No upload, no account, totally for free!

scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/web && tsc --noEmit -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/editor-core/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/media-engine/tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json
scripts.lint: ./node_modules/.bin/eslint --config eslint.config.js apps/web/src apps/web/tests packages playwright.config.ts vitest.config.ts
scripts.test:with-e2e: npm test && npm run test:e2e:desktop && playwright test --project=webkit-desktop && npm run test:e2e:mobile
scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test:coverage && npm run test:e2e
